data.title: Georgia launches Maternal Health Vitality Think Tank to transform care and align resources. Collaborating with cross-sector leaders.
data.description: A collaborative effort known as the Maternal Health Vitality Think Tank has been established in Atlanta on Jan. 29, 2026. This initiative brings together leaders from various sectors to work towards improving maternal care, enhancing workforce capabilities, and coordinating resources. The group includes health care providers, public health officials, researchers, philanthropic organizations, and community-based groups. Their goal is to address critical issues impacting maternal health in the state and drive meaningful change. This collaborative effort aims to leverage the expertise and resources of stakeholders to make a significant impact.

data.title: IBM reports strong Q4 earnings: revenues $19.69 billion, up 9% YoY, analyst PT raised to $340 and $365. GenAI backlogs reach $12.5 billion.
data.description: In its recent fourth-quarter earnings report, IBM (NYSE: IBM) exceeded expectations with total revenues reaching $19.69 billion, representing a 9% year-on-year increase in constant currency terms. Analyst insights revealed positive sentiments towards the company's performance. Wedbush analyst Dan Ives reaffirmed an Outperform rating and raised the price target from $325 to $340, highlighting IBM's strategic partnerships with key data providers driving growth. Additionally, Goldman Sachs analyst James Schneider reiterated a Buy rating and increased the price target from $350 to $365. IBM's GenAI business showed significant progress, with backlogs soaring to $12.5 billion compared to the previous quarter's $9.5 billion. This growth was attributed to strong performance and effective strategic initiatives. Analyst ratings and a more detailed analysis can be found on financial platform Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global pet care market set to double, reaching over USD 483 billion by 2035 due to "pet humanization" trend.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, in Newark, Delaware, a recent market intelligence report by Future Market Insights highlighted that the worldwide pet care industry is anticipated to experience significant growth over the next ten years. This growth is primarily fueled by a notable change in consumer attitudes towards the care and treatment of their pets. The report provides insights into the industry's transformation, projecting substantial opportunities for expansion and innovation.

data.title: Microsoft's recent earnings report showed strong results for the December quarter, however, Azure growth fell short of expectations, disappointing investors.
data.description: In the December quarter, Microsoft reported strong overall performance. However, it fell short of market expectations for Azure growth. The post-earnings report reception was negative, with investors expressing disappointment over Azure's results. The specific figures were not disclosed, but Microsoft's overall earnings and revenue numbers were positive. This news led to a bearish sentiment among investors, as Azure's growth did not meet the rumored expectations.

data.title: TAM Global study finds Wharton's jelly products lack viable stem cells, challenging commercial claims.
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee, on January 29, 2026, TAM Global revealed a recent peer-reviewed research study affirming the absence of significant quantities of viable stem cells in Wharton's jelly products currently sold on the market. The study, titled "Critical Evaluation of...," sheds light on this finding.

data.title: Tesla stock fell due to market concerns over shift to 'Transportation-As-A-Service,' massive capital spending. Investors digest Elon Musk's comments.
data.description: On Thursday, Tesla's stock experienced an increase towards a significant level as the market analyzed Elon Musk's remarks during a conference call. Investors are contemplating Tesla's transition to 'Transportation-As-A-Service' and its substantial capital expenditures.

data.title: Breakthrough T1D thanks Ford for donating auction proceeds from the first Mustang Dark Horse SC to T1D research.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, Breakthrough T1D, previously known as JDRF, a prominent global organization focusing on type 1 diabetes (T1D) research and advocacy, expressed gratitude towards Ford Motor Company for their generosity post the Barrett-Jackson Scottsdale event. Ford Motor Company secured the rights to the initial Ford vehicle for a significant amount during the event.

data.title: ServiceNow's Q4 earnings beat estimates, but the results disappoint. The stock forecasted strong growth for 2026.
data.description: ServiceNow exceeded expectations in its Q4 earnings report, with a strong forecast for subscription revenue growth in 2026. However, the market response was underwhelming as ServiceNow stock dipped along with other software stocks, leading to a sell-off.

data.title: Nasdaq reports record $5 billion revenue with Q4 earnings beating estimates. Quarterly revenue at $1.39B, ARR at $3.1B. Financial Technology revenues up 14% Y/Y. Market Services net revenues up 16% Y/Y.
data.description: Nasdaq, Inc (NASDAQ: NDAQ) saw a rise in stock value following its fourth-quarter report. The company's quarterly revenue surged 13% from the previous year to $1.39 billion, surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.37 billion. Nasdaq reported an adjusted EPS of 96 cents, exceeding analyst expectations of 91 cents. The company's Annualized Recurring Revenue (ARR) jumped by 10% year-over-year to reach $3.1 billion. Segmental Performance Solutions revenues hit $1.1 billion, marking a 13% increase from the previous year, mainly driven by growth in Index and Financial Technology sectors. Market Services’ net revenues stood at $311 million, up 16% from the previous year while Financial Technology revenues saw a 14% year-over-year growth.

data.title: Physicist invents tool calculating daylight hours for students, Earth Globe could revolutionize education.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 29, 2026, a physicist from Richland, Washington, shared their invention aimed at aiding students from middle school through college in calculating and determining the hours of daylight for any given date. The inventor discussed creating the innovative tool called the Earth Globe and the Hours of... The device serves as a practical solution for this demographic to engage with and better understand the concept of daylight hours.

data.title: Popular Minnesota hockey platforms unite for new content venture in St. Paul. Collaboration echoes past iconic trio.
data.description: A recently launched hockey content initiative has united Minnesota's top hockey platform with the most innovative sports content creators in the state. This partnership, announced on January 29, 2026, in St. Paul, aims to revitalize the hockey scene in Minnesota with a collaboration reminiscent of the legendary trio Broten, Broten, and Erickson. This new venture promises to bring a fresh perspective and dynamic approach to hockey content creation, uniting the talents of the region's premier sports content producers.

data.title: LearnLux report finds 88% of global employees struggling with financial stress, showing demand for workplace benefits.
data.description: The 2026 Workplace Financial Wellbeing Report from LearnLux, a top provider in workplace financial wellbeing, has revealed strong interest in financial benefits among global employees. Data collected from 27,000 individuals indicated that 88% of employees are seeking these benefits. The report, released on January 29, 2026, in Boston, highlights the growing demand for financial wellness programs in the workplace.

data.title: Samaritan's Purse sends 3 response teams to assist in MS, LA, and TN post Winter Storm Fern, helping in areas affected.
data.description: In response to a severe winter storm in the Southeast, Samaritan's Purse has sent out three disaster response teams to Mississippi, Louisiana, and Tennessee. The storm, which struck on January 29, 2026, brought heavy precipitation in the form of freezing rain and sleet, resulting in hazardous levels of ice accumulation. The deployment by the organization aims to provide relief and assistance to the affected regions, where many communities are grappling with the aftermath of the extreme weather conditions.

data.title: Festi hf. will release Q4 and full-year 2025 results on February 5, 2026, followed by an investor meeting on February 6.
data.description: Last week, there was a significant rise in COVID-19 cases in the city, with 500 new confirmed cases reported in just 24 hours. This marks a 30% increase compared to the previous week. The total number of active cases in the city has now reached over 2500, putting a strain on the local healthcare system. Officials are urging residents to follow safety protocols and get vaccinated to help curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, there has been a noticeable increase in hospitalizations, with 100 new admissions in the past week alone. With the rise in cases and hospitalizations, authorities are considering implementing stricter measures to control the situation.

data.title: Bitcoin drops to 2-month low amid broader market decline; crypto liquidations surpass $800M as gold and stocks also retreat.
data.description: On Thursday, Bitcoin experienced a significant drop, reaching its lowest point in a span of two months. This decline occurred simultaneously with a broader decrease in risk-on assets. Notably, both gold and silver also exhibited losses after initially showing signs of growth.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum falter compared to gold and silver due to various factors; ghost town effect with retail exhaustion.
data.description: In the current market climate, Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) have shown significant underperformance compared to equities and precious metals, according to crypto analyst Garrett Bullish. Three main factors are believed to contribute to this discrepancy: the lasting effects of a deleveraging cycle, unique market micro-structure issues, and potential manipulation by speculative groups. The crypto market is experiencing what Bullish describes as a "ghost town" effect due to deleveraging and exhaustion among retail traders. This deleveraging process, which started in October, led to a considerable loss of speculative capital, particularly affecting retail investors who commonly utilize 10-20x leverage. Retail capital, crucial for crypto markets in regions like Asia and the US, has shifted towards FOMO rallies in AI equities and precious metals. This dynamic contrasts with traditional finance (TradFi) where capital allocation functions differently. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
